questions.question: What does `useEventListener` from VueUse do automatically when a component unmounts?
options: It re-emits the event to the parent component
It saves the last event to localStorage
It removes the event listener automatically
It replays the last event on remount

questions.question: Which VueUse composable creates shared state across components without Pinia?
When should you write your own composable instead of using VueUse?
options: Always: custom composables are faster than VueUse
When the logic is domain-specific to your application
When the VueUse composable uses TypeScript
